title: P@lesheth #6429
definition:
Philistia = "land of sojourners"

 1) the general territory on the west coast of Canaan or the entire
    country of Palestine
nasbUsage:
Definition: Philistia = "land of sojourners"

 1) the general territory on the west coast of Canaan or the entire
    country of Palestine

    NASB:  a territory on the S. Mediterranean coast of Isr.
